(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #5)

> … 14.0 is not yet in the sidebar …

Last week's draft sanity-checked, locally: 


<https://github.com/grahamperrin/freebsd-doc/tree/266167-sidenav> 
sync fork
cd /usr/doc
gh pr checkout 3
cd /usr/doc/website
make -j2 run


<http://localhost:1313/releases/> (screenshot attached) and nearby pages, the sidebar looks OK, to me. I'll make a review in Phabricator.
